name: Curried Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, sauté the chopped onion and garlic in 2 cups of water until translucent.
2. Add the sliced carrots, green pepper, and celery to the pan. Stir occasionally.
3. Sprinkle in the curry powder, coriander, turmeric, ground cumin, dry mustard, and red pepper flakes.
4. Pour in an additional 1 cup of water if needed, ensuring the vegetables do not stick together.
5. Cook for about 10 minutes until the vegetables are tender.
6. Stir in the peeled and chopped potatoes along with the remaining 3 cups of water. Cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Add the cauliflower florets and cook for another 15 minutes.
8. Finally, add the cleaned mushrooms and frozen peas, cooking for an additional 10 minutes until all ingredients are heated through.
This recipe is delicious served over brown rice or baked potatoes, or rolled up in a whole wheat tortilla.
